script.speaker: Philomel Lapis
script.text: Oh! A visitor... Welcome to the Riannon Institute of Alchemy.

script.speaker: Philomel Lapis
script.text: I'm Philomel — a researcher here. I help maintain the archives and special collections.

script.speaker: Philomel Lapis
script.text: We have light novels, historical records, academy research notes, and field reports from adventurers across Lyr.

script.speaker: Philomel Lapis
script.text: Feel free to browse the shelves and pick up anything that catches your eye. I'll be here if you need help!
